summary: Jared restored the live v0.2.0 Worker source into GitHub as workers/contractor-v003-2-afo/contractor-v003-2-afo.js and replaced worker.js with a conventional re-export entrypoint. ChatGPT verified the source file exists and is 64066 bytes, but did not patch/redeploy because the available GitHub read output is truncated and commit_file requires full-file replacement.

workers/contractor-v003-2-afo/worker.js.role: standard entrypoint that re-exports default from ./contractor-v003-2-afo.js

workers/contractor-v003-2-afo/contractor.role: restored full Worker source copied from Cloudflare

phase3_code_gaps_seen_in_restored_source: handleLeads destructures lead_section but INSERT statement still writes only name,email,phone,service,message,source,created_at and does not save lead_section, budget_range, or timeline.
handleCallback destructures preferred_time/preferred_date/project_type/notes but does not destructure lead_section and INSERT statement does not save lead_section/status directly.
Chat callback_time path inserts callback rows with source chat_estimate but does not save lead_section.
Admin route helpers currently show handleAdminLeads and handleAdminCallbacks list endpoints; PATCH status endpoints and CSV endpoints were not visible in the restored-source preview/search results.
safe_next_steps: Use a tool capable of editing/patching a large GitHub file without replacing it from truncated output, or have Jared paste/provide the full contractor-v003-2-afo.js source into a file-edit capable environment.
Patch handleLeads to save lead_section, budget_range, and timeline into the already-existing D1 columns.
Patch handleCallback and chat callback insertions to save lead_section into callbacks.
Add PATCH /api/admin/leads/{id} and PATCH /api/admin/callbacks/{id} status workflow endpoints with allowlists.
Update public JS/forms so each CTA passes section labels and lead form submits budget_range/timeline.
Deploy only after complete source patch is available and bindings are set: V003_2_DB, V003_2_VECTORIZE, V003_2_R2, AI.
reason_no_deploy: Avoided partial overwrite of a 64 KB restored Worker source because the available source display is truncated and live source-read via cloudflare get_worker_source previously returned HTTP 405.
